coreTypes.coreFear: being corrupt, evil, defective, or morally failing in a way that cannot be corrected
coreTypes.coreDesire: integrity, balance, right action, and a world that matches a good standard
coreTypes.vice: resentment and suppressed anger framed as principled correction

coreTypes.coreFear: being unwanted, unloved, dispensable, or without place in the human weave
coreTypes.coreDesire: to be loved, needed, and indispensable to someone who matters
coreTypes.vice: pride expressed as helpful indispensability and hidden ledgers of debt

coreTypes.coreFear: being worthless, exposed as a fraud, or failing publicly in what counts
coreTypes.coreDesire: to feel valuable, admirable, and successful in the eyes that matter
coreTypes.vice: deceit of image—performance, selective truth, charm as armor

coreTypes.coreFear: having no identity or significance—being ordinary, abandoned, or emotionally cut off
coreTypes.coreDesire: to find self and be deeply understood in one’s particularity
coreTypes.vice: envy—longing framed as taste, wound, and distance from the ‘simple happy’

coreTypes.coreFear: being overwhelmed, invaded, emptied, or incompetent in a world that demands too much
coreTypes.coreDesire: mastery, self-sufficiency, and enough inner space to think clearly
coreTypes.vice: avarice of energy—hoarding time, knowledge, privacy

coreTypes.coreFear: being without support, guidance, or security—abandoned to chaos or hostile force
coreTypes.vice: fear run as loyalty tests, suspicion, and hypervigilance

coreTypes.coreFear: being trapped in pain, boredom, limitation, or emotional confinement
coreTypes.coreDesire: freedom, variety, and future possibility—life kept open
coreTypes.vice: gluttony for stimulation—escape through plan, story, and new frontiers

coreTypes.coreFear: being harmed, controlled, humiliated, or at another’s mercy
coreTypes.coreDesire: self-protection and autonomy—life on one’s own terms

coreTypes.coreFear: loss of connection, inner peace, or cohesion—being disturbed into nonbeing
coreTypes.coreDesire: inner stability, belonging, and gentle continuity
coreTypes.vice: sloth of soul—numbing, merging, postponing decisive selfhood

growthStressMovement.stressNotes: Under sustained pressure, attention collapses into brooding comparison and personal defectiveness; ideals feel unreachable.
growthStressMovement.growthNotes: Under relief, mind opens to spontaneous joy, curiosity, and acceptance without constant correction.

growthStressMovement.stressNotes: Pressure triggers blunt control, territorial anger, and open demands—helpfulness drops for dominance.
growthStressMovement.growthNotes: Safety allows authentic feeling, boundaries, and desire named without bargaining.

growthStressMovement.stressNotes: Pressure produces numbness, procrastination, merging, and quiet resentment—momentum hides.
growthStressMovement.growthNotes: Growth brings loyalty tests, sober risk assessment, and willingness to depend on others.

growthStressMovement.stressNotes: Stress collapses into people-pleasing, cling, and resentment when love is conditional.
growthStressMovement.growthNotes: Growth steadies into principle, craft, and disciplined creation instead of endless mood.

growthStressMovement.stressNotes: Stress scatters into distraction, manic options, and brittle cheer—boundaries blur oddly.
growthStressMovement.growthNotes: Growth moves into directness, bodily presence, and protective action without over-analysis.

growthStressMovement.stressNotes: Stress drives performance panic, image management, and ruthless practicality.
growthStressMovement.growthNotes: Growth softens into steadiness, tolerance, and less catastrophic forecasting.

growthStressMovement.stressNotes: Stress tightens into criticism, rules, and bitter judgment—fun curdles into fault-finding.
growthStressMovement.growthNotes: Growth slows into focus, depth, and tolerating limitation without panic.

growthStressMovement.stressNotes: Stress withdraws into secret hoarding, suspicion, and minimalist retreat—force goes underground.
growthStressMovement.growthNotes: Growth opens into tenderness, chosen vulnerability, and protective care without domination.

growthStressMovement.stressNotes: Stress amplifies worry, suspicion, and anxious scanning—peace shatters into vigilance.
growthStressMovement.growthNotes: Growth awakens initiative, visibility, and accountable action without self-erasure.
